heading: Statements to accompany significant regulatory actions
label: 1532 Statements to accompany significant regulatory actions

children.text: an identification of the provision of Federal law under which the rule is being promulgated;

children.label: A
children.text: an analysis of the extent to which such costs to State, local, and tribal governments may be paid with Federal financial assistance (or otherwise paid for by the Federal Government); and

children.label: B
children.text: the extent to which there are available Federal resources to carry out the intergovernmental mandate;

children.label: A
children.text: the future compliance costs of the Federal mandate; and

children.label: B
children.text: any disproportionate budgetary effects of the Federal mandate upon any particular regions of the nation or particular State, local, or tribal governments, urban or rural or other types of communities, or particular segments of the private sector;

estimates by the agency of the effect on the national economy, such as the effect on productivity, economic growth, full employment, creation of productive jobs, and international competitiveness of United States goods and services, if and to the extent that the agency in its sole discretion determines that accurate estimates are reasonably feasible and that such effect is relevant and material; and

children.label: A
children.text: a description of the extent of the agency’s prior consultation with elected representatives (under ) of the affected State, local, and tribal governments;section 1534 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: a summary of the comments and concerns that were presented by State, local, or tribal governments either orally or in writing to the agency; and

children.label: C
children.text: a summary of the agency’s evaluation of those comments and concerns.

children.heading: Promulgation
children.label: b Promulgation
children.text: In promulgating a general notice of proposed rulemaking or a final rule for which a statement under subsection (a) is required, the agency shall include in the promulgation a summary of the information contained in the statement.

children.heading: Preparation in conjunction with other statement
children.label: c Preparation in conjunction with other statement
children.text: Any agency may prepare any statement required under subsection (a) in conjunction with or as a part of any other statement or analysis, provided that the statement or analysis satisfies the provisions of subsection (a).
